description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark wood or laminate finish and a minimalist design. The desk features a flat, spacious tabletop supported by two sleek, curved metal legs on one side and a solid pedestal on the other. The pedestal contains three horizontal drawers, each with a metallic handle, providing ample storage for office supplies or documents. The metal legs and handles have a polished, silvery appearance, contrasting with the deep, almost black color of the wood. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, suitable for both professional and home office environments. The clean lines and lack of ornamentation give it a contemporary, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A modern, dark-finished desk with a flat top, three metal-handled drawers on one side, and curved metal legs. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it ideal for office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat tabletop, three metal-handled drawers on the right, and curved metal legs on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid side panel of the pedestal and the depth of the desk, with metal legs visible at the corners.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the pedestal and the open space beneath the desk, with both metal legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side of the desk without drawers, emphasizing the width and the metal leg structure.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, providing access to storage and legroom, while the solid back panel faces away.
